title: H-A2 post exact-replay sample-expansion decision
purpose: Pre-register the next bounded validation-data step after H-A2.49 without treating one exact replay trade as edge evidence.

decision.reason: The first normal/control exact replay added only one candidate trade and that trade lost money after implementable costs. This does not falsify or validate H-A2. The next step should add a second pre-selected normal/control regime window through metadata-only cost estimation before any download or replay.
decision.why_not_download_now: The project has not yet estimated this second pack's cost under the selected key and has not written a separate download decision artifact.
decision.why_not_change_threshold: Changing threshold 0.001 after seeing H-A2.49 would be post-result tuning.
decision.why_not_resume_high_vix_first: H-A2 is currently a clean macro/VIX plus opening-followthrough hypothesis. High-VIX stress coverage remains useful later, but the immediate inference gap is independent normal/control candidate distribution.

candidate_estimate_batches.role: second normal/control validation metadata estimate after H-A2.49

required_fields.reason: Reconstruct auditable 09:35 entry bid/ask and implementable entry price.
Keep implementable PnL, stop/target checks, and 15:45 forced-close handling comparable to existing H-A2 artifacts.
Reconstruct the 09:35 signal and verify underlying context for candidate days.
Use already-local VIX/VXV and macro labels; do not buy news or LLM inputs for this H-A2 decision.

future_execution_sequence.next_step: Run metadata-only cost estimate for post_stress_normalization_control_pack using DATABENTO_API_AI after this validator and paid-cost audit pass.
download_forbidden_until: The metadata-only estimate report exists for post_stress_normalization_control_pack.
Projected selected-key and MO/AI pool usage remain under cap.
A separate download decision artifact names the selected batch and confirms it still serves H-A2 normal/control validation without threshold changes.
do_not_do: Do not download broad 2025 calendar data.
Do not resume high-VIX-first acquisition before the second normal/control estimate decision.
Do not add an OOS-selected filter.
Do not run exact replay, paper trading, or E2 acceptance from this artifact.

allowed_claims: H-A2.49 remains E1 single-candidate evidence only.
The next H-A2 sample-expansion step is pre-registered as metadata-only cost estimation for post_stress_normalization_control_pack.
The locked 09:35-only H-A2 signal and threshold 0.001 are preserved.
DATABENTO_API_AI is the selected key env for the next metadata-only estimate, with no key value stored.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade evidence.
Do not download paid data from this artifact.
Do not call live Databento metadata estimates from this artifact itself.
Do not request IBKR bars from this artifact.
Do not call LLMs from this artifact.
Do not retry GDELT from this artifact.
Do not add a new OOS-selected filter.
Do not treat sample-expansion planning as validation evidence.
completion_criteria: The decision cites H-A2.49 as E1 single-candidate evidence only.
The decision names exact normal/control sample dates before any additional provider call.
The selected sample dates have local VIX below 25 and no high-importance macro day in the local macro calendar.
The decision records the selected Databento key env name without storing key value.
The decision preserves the locked 09:35-only signal and threshold 0.001.
The decision forbids paid download, exact replay, paper trading, and E2 claims.
tier_blockers: No live metadata cost estimate yet
No additional normal/control PnL days added
